notes:
v1.10.1 Update
🔁 Stellar R/L Mirror: Char Adjust mirror now flips characters during both Stellar right and left animations.
🔤 Font Settings: Saved All-Out Attack playback and vote sessions now keep main/sub font and bold/italic settings. Personal themes including Arcane also respect selected text fonts.
🎲 Midi-QOL Damage Triggers: Item Dice Check and Advanced Formula triggers now read Midi-QOL workflow attack and damage roll dice data instead of only the item card.

announcement.title: 🎬 Cinematic Cut-ins v1.10.1
announcement.content:
v1.10.1: Bug Fixes

  • Stellar R/L Mirror: Char Adjust mirror now works during the Stellar right and left character animations.
  • Font Settings: Saved All-Out Attack playback, vote sessions, and personal themes such as Arcane now respect selected main/sub fonts and bold/italic settings.
  • Midi-QOL Damage Triggers: Item Dice Check and Advanced Formula triggers now read attack and damage roll dice from Midi-QOL workflow data.
